base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of special_chars — a character (playable) from 1997 final fantasy tactics. Cloud (FF7 cameo!) + Mustadio + Rafa + Malak + Beowulf + Reis + others. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cloud (FF7 cameo!) + Mustadio + Rafa + Malak + Beowulf + Reis + others
